title: Software Development Engineer III - AI
company_focus:
AI-powered white-label sales & marketing SaaS platform for
agencies and businesses
description:
About HighLevel:

HighLevel is an AI powered, all-in-one white-label sales &
marketing platform that empowers agencies, entrepreneurs,
and businesses to elevate their digital presence and drive
growth. We are proud to support a global and growing
community of over 2 million businesses, comprised of
agencies, consultants, and businesses of all sizes and
industries. HighLevel empowers users  with all the tools
needed to capture, nurture, and close new leads into repeat
customers. As of mid 2025, HighLevel processes over 4
billion API hits and handles more than 2.5 billion message
events every day. Our platform manages over 470 terabytes of
data distributed across five databases, operates with a
network of over 250 microservices, and supports over 1
million hostnames.

Our People

With over 1,500 team members across 15+ countries, we
operate in a global, remote-first environment. We are
building more than software; we are building a global
community rooted in creativity, collaboration, and impact.
We take pride in cultivating a culture where innovation
thrives, ideas are celebrated, and people come first, no
matter where they call home.

Our Impact

As of mid 2025, our platform powers over 1.5 billion
messages, helps generate over 200 million leads, and
facilitates over 20 million conversations for the more than
2 million businesses we serve each month. Behind those
numbers are real people growing their companies, connecting
with customers, and making their mark - and we get to help
make that happen.

About the Role:

At HighLevel, we are redefining what it means to be an
"Engineer." We envision a new era of engineering where
individual builders are empowered by AI to act as an entire
product squad. The "Team of One" is a unique, high-autonomy
role designed for the ultimate 0 to 1 builder.

In this role, you don't just write code, you own the entire
outcome. Leveraging a sophisticated AI-native stack, you
will navigate the full SDLC, from product strategy and UI/UX
design to full-stack implementation and automated QA. You
aren't just an "individual contributor"; you are a self-
contained unit of innovation.

Responsibilities:

- Product: Act as your own requirements enhancer. Use AI to
  define requirements, and translate business goals into
  technical specifications while keeping cost and scale in
  mind
- UX/UI: Take ownership of the user journey. Utilize AI-
  assisted design tools to build intuitive, high-fidelity
  interfaces that align with our design system
- Full-Stack Engineering: Build, ship, and scale. You will
  implement features across the entire stack, utilizing AI
  coding agents to handle boilerplate and complex
  refactoring while you focus on high-level architecture and
  logic. You will be equipped with the finest internal tools
  to aid you in this endeavor
- Quality Assurance: Own the reliability of your shipments.
  You will design and orchestrate AI-driven test suites that
  ensure near-zero regression and high performance
- 0 to 1 Building: Lead new initiatives from a blank page to a
  production-ready feature, maintaining a relentless pace of
  iteration.
- Team Validation: While you maintain ultimate ownership of
  your work, a dedicated team — comprising product, design,
  senior staff engineers, and quality assurance—will review,
  validate and share feedback around the completed work
  before it is deployed to production

Requirements:

- Industry Experience: 4+ years of experience as a software
  engineer
- Technical Skills: This is a full-stack role with hands-on
  frontend skills (Vue.js or React.js or Angular) and
  backend experience in Node.js or Java or Python. Nice to
  have experience with Vue.js and Node.js
- AI-First Mindset: You don't just "use" AI; it is the
  backbone of your workflow. You are an expert at prompt
  engineering and orchestrating multi-agent systems to
  multiply your output across the entire SDLC
- Customer-First Philosophy: You understand that technology
  exists to solve business problems. You build with the end-
  user in mind, ensuring every line of code adds tangible
  value
- 0 to 1 Expertise: You have a proven track record of building
  products from scratch. You thrive in ambiguity and enjoy
  the challenge of "figuring it out."
- Full SDLC Fluency: You are comfortable wearing multiple
  hats-Designer today, Architect tomorrow, QA Lead the day
  after.
- Philosophy: You align with a culture of practical learning
  and high autonomy. You believe in building sustainable,
  bootstrapped-mindset solutions that scale

EEO Statement:

The company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer
subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to
voluntarily provide the following demographic information.
This information is used solely for compliance with
government record-keeping, reporting, and other legal
requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and
refusal to do so will not affect your application status.
This data will be kept separate from your application and
will not be used in the hiring decision.

#LI-Remote #LI-PG1
responsibilities: Define requirements and translate business goals into technical specifications using AI assistance
Design and build intuitive, high-fidelity user interfaces using AI-assisted design tools
Implement full-stack features across the entire stack leveraging AI coding agents for development
Design and orchestrate AI-driven test suites for automated quality assurance
Lead new initiatives from concept to production-ready features with rapid iteration
Collaborate with product, design, senior engineers, and QA for validation before deployment
use_cases: AI-powered sales and marketing automation platform
White-label SaaS solution for agencies and businesses
Lead capture, nurturing, and conversion systems
Customer engagement and digital presence management
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role requires expertise in prompt engineering and
orchestrating multi-agent systems as a core workflow
requirement. The "AI-First Mindset" is explicitly described
as using AI as "the backbone of your workflow" and
orchestrating multi-agent systems throughout the SDLC,
indicating hands-on work with AI/LLM systems.
